name: Bug Fix via PopKit Quick Mode
description: Fix a simple bug using /popkit:dev quick workflow
workflowCommand: /popkit:dev quick fix the timezone bug in formatDate utility
prompt: The formatDate utility in utils/date.ts has a bug - it doesn't account for the user's timezone when displaying dates. The dates are showing in UTC instead of the user's local timezone. Please fix this bug.
author: PopKit
